About BounceBit

BounceBit pioneers CeDeFi infrastructure, offering institutional-grade yield products, restaking use cases, Real World Asset (RWA) integration, and CeDeFi as a service, making high-yield opportunities accessible to all.

The BounceBit chain, the dual-token PoS Layer 1 secured by BTC and $BB, leverages Bitcoin's security with full EVM compatibility.
By designing liquidity custody tokens(LCTs) and partnering with CEFFU, users earn tangible interest from CeFi and utilize LCTs for restaking and on-chain DeFi farming.

BounceBit Chain

Democratizing Institutional Yield

Traditionally, high-yield opportunities within the Bitcoin asset class were reserved for quant funds and top asset management firms. BounceBit aims to democratize these opportunities, making them accessible to retail investors and smaller institutions through our innovative CeDeFi infrastructure. Our infrastructure offers a selection of transparent and secure yield-generating products, enabling users to grow assets within the CeDeFi ecosystem.

Bridge Between CeFi and DeFi

CeDeFi combines the benefits and profits of centralized finance(CeFi) with the transparency and security of decentralized finance(DeFi). BounceBit invents Liquidity Custody Tokens(LCTs) and partners with custody provider, CEFFUʼs mirrorX solution, allowing token holders to simultaneously earn income on-chain through staking and DeFi, and off-exchange through CeFi. This seamless integration ensures users maximize their earning potential in the CeDeFi landscape.

Expanding CeDeFi Use Cases

The BounceBit chain ensures transparent and efficient settlement and record-keeping on-chain, reinforcing the reliability of our CeDeFi infrastructure. Our unique dual-token PoS structure enables users to earn staking rewards in $BB by securing the chain with either BBTC or BB tokens. The on-chain CeDeFi ecosystem offers diverse yield opportunities, allowing users to participate in various activities such as swaps, issuing meme tokens, and engaging in DeFi derivative trading, thereby generating additional income. By continuously expanding the use cases of CeDeFi, BounceBit provides maximum flexibility and yield opportunities for all users.

Security & Compliance

Secure Onboarding & Transactions

Comprehensive KYC, KYT, and AML protocols ensure regulatory compliance, full transparency, and secure onboarding for all users.

Robust Asset Protection

Multi-layer custody architecture protects user assets with secure segregation, strict access controls, and real-time risk monitoring.

Licensed Investment Management

Operates under a regulated framework and has acquired a BVI investment business license, enabling compliant fund management services across jurisdictions.

Resilient, Compliant Infrastructure

Enterprise-grade cloud security, encryption, and disaster recovery protocols ensure platform stability, scalability, and alignment with global standards.
